messages.text: The slagborn brute swings a fist of half-cooled slag into you, and the molten spatter clings and burns for {damage}.
The slagborn brute hammers down where you stood, splitting the crust and flinging up a gout of sparks.
The slagborn brute catches you full-on with a fist of glowing slag and drives you into the wall for {damage}!
